sections.title: Pattern
rows: I would prefer to leave tomorrow.
I would like to change the date.
It would be more convenient for me.

items.es: Preferiría tener la reunión por la mañana.
items.en: I would prefer to have the meeting in the morning.

items.es: Me gustaría quedarme una noche más.
items.en: I would like to stay one more night.

items.es: Sería más cómodo para mí viajar en tren.
items.en: It would be more convenient for me to travel by train.

items.es: No me gustaría vivir tan lejos del centro.
items.en: I would not like to live so far from downtown.

items.es: Si es posible, preferiría pagar con tarjeta.
items.en: If possible, I would prefer to pay by card.
